homepage.heroSubline: Hopkins Renovation & Design: Bringing your vision to life with quality craftsmanship and exceptional service. Serving Atlanta and surrounding areas.
homepage.aboutTitle: Crafting Atlanta Homes, Building Lasting Relationships
aboutText: Hopkins Renovation & Design began with a simple goal: to provide Atlanta homeowners with honest, reliable, and high-quality renovation services. Founded by a third-generation contractor with deep roots in the community, we understand the unique challenges and opportunities presented by Atlanta's diverse housing stock.

Our approach is built on clear communication, meticulous planning, and a commitment to exceeding expectations. We believe in transparency, keeping you informed every step of the way. From initial consultation to final walkthrough, your satisfaction is our top priority.

We're proud to be a part of the Atlanta community, and we're dedicated to giving back. We actively support local organizations and strive to minimize our environmental impact through responsible construction practices.

valueProps.title: Local Expertise
valueProps.description: Deep understanding of Atlanta's architecture and climate challenges.

valueProps.title: Transparent Pricing
valueProps.description: Clear, detailed estimates with no hidden fees—ever.

valueProps.title: Quality Craftsmanship
valueProps.description: Skilled professionals dedicated to superior workmanship.

valueProps.title: Dedicated Project Management
valueProps.description: Ensuring your project stays on time and within budget.

homepage.ctaSubline: Contact us today for a free consultation and let's discuss your renovation dreams.

services.name: Kitchen Remodeling
services.shortDescription: Transform your kitchen into the heart of your Atlanta home.
services.description:
Is your kitchen outdated, cramped, or simply not meeting your needs? Hopkins Renovation & Design specializes in creating beautiful and functional kitchens tailored to your lifestyle. From minor cosmetic updates to complete gut renovations, we handle every aspect of the project with precision and care.

We start with a thorough consultation to understand your vision, budget, and priorities. Our designers will work with you to create a custom plan that maximizes space, enhances functionality, and reflects your personal style. We source high-quality materials and appliances from trusted suppliers, ensuring durability and lasting beauty.

Our skilled craftsmen handle all aspects of the renovation, including cabinet installation, countertop fabrication, plumbing, electrical work, and flooring. We pay close attention to detail and ensure that every element is perfectly executed. We understand the importance of minimizing disruption to your daily life, so we work efficiently and keep the job site clean and organized. Whether you dream of a modern, minimalist kitchen or a cozy, traditional space, Hopkins Renovation & Design can bring your vision to life.

faq.question: How long does a typical kitchen remodel take?
faq.answer: The timeline varies depending on the scope of the project, but most kitchen remodels take between 6-12 weeks. We'll provide a detailed schedule upfront and keep you informed throughout the process.

faq.question: Do I need to move out during the renovation?
faq.answer: While it's not always necessary, it can be more comfortable to relocate during the demolition and major construction phases. We'll work with you to minimize disruption and keep essential areas accessible.

faq.question: What is the cost of a kitchen remodel in Atlanta?
faq.answer: Kitchen remodel costs in Atlanta will vary widely based on size, materials, and complexity. We offer free consultations to provide accurate, detailed estimates.

services.name: Bathroom Remodeling
services.shortDescription: Create a relaxing and luxurious bathroom retreat.
services.description:
Transform your outdated bathroom into a spa-like oasis with Hopkins Renovation & Design. Whether you're looking for a simple refresh or a complete overhaul, we have the expertise to create a bathroom that meets your needs and exceeds your expectations.

We'll guide you through every step of the process, from design and material selection to installation and finishing touches. Our designers will help you choose the perfect fixtures, tiles, and finishes to create a space that reflects your personal style. We handle all aspects of the renovation, including plumbing, electrical work, tiling, and fixture installation.

We understand the importance of functionality and efficiency, so we'll work with you to optimize the layout and storage space in your bathroom. Whether you need a larger shower, a soaking tub, or more counter space, we can create a custom solution that meets your needs. We use only high-quality materials and employ skilled craftsmen to ensure that your bathroom remodel is built to last. In Atlanta, moisture is a major factor, so we make sure to waterproof everything correctly.

faq.question: Can you help me with the design of my new bathroom?
faq.answer: Absolutely! We have a team of experienced designers who will work with you to create a design that meets your needs and reflects your style.

faq.question: How long does a bathroom remodel typically take?
faq.answer: The timeline depends on the scope of the project, but most bathroom remodels take between 3-8 weeks.

faq.question: What permits are required for a bathroom remodel?
faq.answer: Permit requirements vary depending on the scope of the project. We will handle all necessary permits to ensure that your renovation is compliant with local building codes.

services.name: Basement Finishing
services.shortDescription: Unlock the hidden potential of your basement with our finishing services.
services.description:
Transform your unfinished basement into a valuable living space with Hopkins Renovation & Design. A finished basement can add significant value to your home and provide much-needed space for a home theater, playroom, home office, or extra bedrooms.

We handle every aspect of the basement finishing process, from framing and insulation to electrical and plumbing. We'll ensure that your finished basement is comfortable, functional, and up to code. Atlanta basements can be damp, so moisture control is a major factor in a successful basement finishing project.

Our design team will work with you to create a layout that maximizes space and meets your specific needs. We'll help you choose the right flooring, lighting, and finishes to create a space that you'll love. We use only high-quality materials and employ skilled craftsmen to ensure that your basement finish is built to last.

faq.question: How much does it cost to finish a basement in Atlanta?
faq.answer: The cost depends on the size of the basement and the complexity of the project. We offer free consultations to provide accurate estimates.

faq.question: Do I need a permit to finish my basement?
faq.answer: Yes, a permit is required for most basement finishing projects. We will handle all necessary permits to ensure compliance with local codes.

faq.question: How long does it take to finish a basement?
faq.answer: The timeline depends on the scope of the project, but most basement finishes take between 4-12 weeks.

services.name: Deck & Patio Construction
services.shortDescription: Extend your living space outdoors with a custom deck or patio.
services.description:
Enhance your outdoor living space with a custom deck or patio from Hopkins Renovation & Design. We design and build beautiful and functional decks and patios that complement your home and lifestyle. Whether you're looking for a cozy space for relaxing or a large area for entertaining, we can create the perfect outdoor space for you.

We use only high-quality materials and employ skilled craftsmen to ensure that your deck or patio is built to last. We handle all aspects of the project, from design and permitting to construction and finishing. We offer a wide range of decking materials, including wood, composite, and PVC. For patios, we install pavers, stone, and concrete.

Our designers will work with you to create a design that meets your needs and reflects your style. We'll consider factors such as sun exposure, drainage, and traffic flow to create a space that is both beautiful and functional. We're familiar with the Atlanta climate, and how it affects the longevity of outdoor structures.

faq.question: What materials are best for decks in Atlanta's climate?
faq.answer: Composite decking is a popular choice due to its durability and resistance to moisture and insects. Pressure-treated wood is another option, but it requires regular maintenance.

faq.question: Do I need a permit to build a deck or patio?
faq.answer: Yes, a permit is typically required for deck and patio construction. We will handle all necessary permits to ensure compliance with local codes.

faq.question: How long does it take to build a deck or patio?
faq.answer: The timeline depends on the size and complexity of the project, but most decks and patios take between 2-6 weeks to build.

services.name: Whole House Renovations
services.shortDescription: Transform your entire home with our comprehensive renovation services.
services.description:
Dreaming of a completely transformed home? Hopkins Renovation & Design specializes in whole house renovations, turning outdated houses into modern, functional, and beautiful living spaces. We handle every aspect of the renovation process, from initial design to final finishing touches.

Our experienced team will work closely with you to understand your vision, needs, and budget. We'll create a comprehensive plan that addresses all aspects of the renovation, including structural changes, electrical and plumbing upgrades, and cosmetic improvements. We understand that whole house renovations can be disruptive, so we prioritize clear communication, efficient project management, and minimal inconvenience to your family.

We use only high-quality materials and employ skilled craftsmen to ensure that your renovation is built to last. Whether you're looking to update your kitchen, bathrooms, flooring, or entire layout, Hopkins Renovation & Design can bring your vision to life. We're experienced with the unique challenges of renovating older Atlanta homes, from Craftsman bungalows to mid-century ranches.

faq.question: How long does a whole house renovation typically take?
faq.answer: The timeline depends on the scope of the project, but most whole house renovations take between 3-9 months.

faq.question: Will I need to move out during the renovation?
faq.answer: In most cases, it is necessary to move out during a whole house renovation due to the extensive work involved.

faq.question: How much does a whole house renovation cost in Atlanta?
faq.answer: The cost varies depending on the size and scope of the project. We offer free consultations to provide accurate, detailed estimates.

services.name: Interior & Exterior Painting
services.shortDescription: Refresh and protect your home with our professional painting services.
services.description:
Give your home a fresh new look with Hopkins Renovation & Design's professional painting services. Whether you're looking to update your interior walls or protect your exterior from the elements, we have the expertise to deliver exceptional results.

We use only high-quality paints and employ skilled painters to ensure a smooth, even finish. We handle all aspects of the painting process, from surface preparation and priming to painting and cleanup. We pay close attention to detail and ensure that every surface is properly prepped and painted for long-lasting beauty and protection.

For exterior painting, we understand the unique challenges of Atlanta's climate. We'll choose the right paint and techniques to protect your home from the sun, rain, and humidity. For interior painting, we'll help you choose the perfect colors to create the desired ambiance in each room. We take care to protect your furniture and belongings during the painting process.

faq.question: How long does it take to paint a house?
faq.answer: The timeline depends on the size of the house and the scope of the project. We will provide a detailed schedule upfront.

faq.question: What type of paint do you use?
faq.answer: We use only high-quality paints from trusted brands like Sherwin-Williams and Benjamin Moore.

faq.question: Do you offer color consultations?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer color consultations to help you choose the perfect colors for your home.

serviceAreas.content:
Hopkins Renovation & Design is proud to offer our expert general contractor services to the residents of Marietta, Georgia. Known for its charming town square and historic landmarks, Marietta is a vibrant community with a diverse range of homes, many dating back to the 1960s and 70s. We understand the unique challenges and opportunities presented by these established subdivisions, and we're committed to providing renovation and design solutions that enhance the character and value of your home.

From kitchen and bathroom remodels to whole-house renovations, we have the experience and expertise to handle any project, big or small. We're also well-versed in the specific needs of homes in Marietta, including addressing issues related to the hot and humid Georgia summers. We prioritize energy efficiency and durable materials to ensure your renovations stand the test of time.
serviceAreas.localContext: Marietta features many established neighborhoods built in the 1960s and 70s. Hopkins Renovation & Design provides services to help homeowners modernize their spaces while respecting the original character.

serviceAreas.content:
Hopkins Renovation & Design provides expert general contractor services to homeowners in Roswell, Georgia. Roswell is characterized by its upscale subdivisions developed primarily in the 1980s and 90s. We understand the architectural styles prevalent in these neighborhoods and tailor our renovation and design services to complement them.

Whether you're looking to update your kitchen, create a luxurious master suite, or transform your outdoor living space, we have the skills and resources to bring your vision to life. We also understand the importance of energy efficiency and sustainability, and we can help you make your home more comfortable and environmentally friendly. We take pride in delivering exceptional results that exceed your expectations.
serviceAreas.localContext: Roswell presents a mix of upscale homes built in the 1980s and 90s. Hopkins Renovation & Design has extensive experience renovating similar properties.

reviews.name: Sarah M.
reviews.text: Hopkins Renovation & Design transformed our outdated kitchen into a dream space! The team was professional, communicative, and paid incredible attention to detail. We especially appreciated their help with selecting the perfect countertops and backsplash. Highly recommend!

reviews.name: David R.
reviews.text: We hired Hopkins to remodel our master bathroom, and we're very happy with the results. The new shower is amazing, and the tile work is beautiful. There were a couple of minor delays, but the team was always responsive and addressed our concerns promptly.

reviews.name: Jessica L.
reviews.text: Hopkins Renovation & Design did an excellent job finishing our basement. They turned an unused space into a functional and comfortable living area for our family. The project was completed on time and within budget. We would definitely use them again.

reviews.name: Michael B.
reviews.text: We love our new deck! Hopkins Renovation & Design designed and built a beautiful deck that's perfect for entertaining. The quality of the workmanship is outstanding, and the team was a pleasure to work with. They really understood what we wanted and delivered a fantastic result.

reviews.name: Emily K.
reviews.text: Hopkins Renovation & Design painted the interior of our home, and we're very pleased with the results. The painters were professional, efficient, and respectful of our property. The colors look great, and the finish is smooth and even. Would recommend for anyone in Atlanta needing painting services.

reviews.name: John S.
reviews.text: We hired Hopkins Renovation & Design for a whole house renovation, and they exceeded our expectations. They transformed our outdated house into a modern and stylish home. The team was professional, organized, and dedicated to delivering a high-quality result. They helped us navigate all the design choices, and were very patient with us.
